summary: Comprehensive testing of new search/filter/sort functionality in Smart Inventory & Supply Chain Management System completed successfully. All new UI features working perfectly across all three roles (Farmer, Warehouse, Retailer).
passed_tests: Farmer Dashboard Produce Listing: Search by name/farm, grade filter dropdown, status filter dropdown, clear filters button, column header sorting (Produce/Quantity/Grade/Price), item count updates
Warehouse Dashboard Stock Management: Search by item/retailer, clear search button, pipeline columns (Incoming/Processing/Dispatched), order advancement functionality
Retailer Dashboard Order Management: Search by produce/farm, category filter dropdown, sort dropdown (Name/Price/Quantity), clear filters button, item count updates
Retailer Dashboard Sales Tracking: Search by item name, clear search button, column header sorting (Item/Quantity/Revenue/Date), record count updates
Role switching functionality across all 3 roles
Data filtering and sorting with visual indicators
